problems.text: How many more bricks are in the left stack than in the right stack?
Omar is playing soccer. In the first half he scores 4 goals, and in the second half he scores 7 goals. How many goals did Omar score during the game?
The number on each stone is its weight. Which stone should you move to the other side to make the scale balance? Write its weight.
problems.label: Stone weight:

problems.text: What number goes in the square with the question mark?
How many frogs can balance one cat?
